Maintainer.Profile: Starr — a self-hosted web tool for diagnosing and repairing the SQLite databases behind the *arr apps: Sonarr, Radarr, Lidarr, Sportarr, Readarr, Prowlarr, Whisparr, and Bazarr. It safely stops the target app, takes a compressed timestamped backup, runs SQLite PRAGMA repairs (integrity check, foreign-key repair, WAL checkpoint, VACUUM, REINDEX, ANALYZE) on the idle database, then brings the app back online — with a cron scheduler, multiple instances per app, run history, one-click restore, per-instance backup retention, and completion notifications. Images are built for linux/amd64, published to Docker Hub and GHCR, and signed with cosign.
